title: Ave Maria
subtitle: The Hail Mary
description: The angelic salutation, joining the words of the Archangel Gabriel and Saint Elizabeth with the Church's petition.
latin: et benedictus fructus ventris tui, Iesus.
nunc et in hora mortis nostrae. Amen.
english: and blessed is the fruit of thy womb, Jesus.
now and at the hour of our death. Amen.
